name: Aubree - IHasAFaceLULZ
description:
“Others will comfort saying they’ve seen hell and back, oh really?”

Let’s get this show on the road! In short, she wants you to comfort her in these trying times where she’s fearing for her life.

Different scenarios for each of her friends as well as just a typical user one. Except Bone. I like her, but I got really damn lazy.

I honestly can’t lie, I forgot who made the art. It’s VERY good, though.

IHasAFaceLULZ.
creator: Xiax
